ddls:
CREATE TABLE "species" (
  "species_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each species */,
  "species_name" TEXT /* Scientific name of the species */,
  "common_name" TEXT /* Common name of the species */,
  "family" TEXT /* Family to which the species belongs */,
  "genus" TEXT /* Genus to which the species belongs */,
  "conservation_status" TEXT /* Conservation status of the species */,
  "native_status" TEXT /* Whether the species is native or introduced */,
  "flowering_period" TEXT /* Flowering period of the species */,
  "fruiting_period" TEXT /* Fruiting period of the species */,
  "leaf_type" TEXT /* Type of leaves */,
  "leaf_arrangement" TEXT /* Arrangement of leaves */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("species_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "habit" (
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each habit type */,
  "habit_name" TEXT /* Name of the habit type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the habit type */,
  "max_height" REAL /* Maximum height of the plant */,
  "max_width" REAL /* Maximum width of the plant */,
  "lifespan" TEXT /* Typical lifespan of the plant */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("habit_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "sites" (
  "site_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each site */,
  "site_name" TEXT /* Name of the site */,
  "location" TEXT /* Location of the site */,
  "latitude" REAL /* Latitude of the site */,
  "longitude" REAL /* Longitude of the site */,
  "ecosystem_type" TEXT /* Type of ecosystem (e.g., Forest, Grassland) */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the site */,
  "elevation" REAL /* Elevation of the site */,
  "soil_ph" REAL /* pH of the soil at the site */,
  "vegetation_cover" REAL /* Percentage of vegetation cover */,
  "average_annual_rainfall" REAL /* Average annual rainfall at the site */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_sites_ecosystem_type FOREIGN KEY ("ecosystem_type") REFERENCES ecosystems ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveys" (
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each survey */,
  "site_id" INTEGER /* ID of the site where the survey was conducted */,
  "survey_date" TEXT /* Date of the survey */,
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* ID of the surveyor conducting the survey */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the survey */,
  "start_time" TEXT /* Start time of the survey */,
  "end_time" TEXT /* End time of the survey */,
  "num_observations" INTEGER /* Number of observations made during the survey */,
  "survey_status" TEXT /* Status of the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("survey_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_site_id FOREIGN KEY ("site_id") REFERENCES sites ("site_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_surveys_surveyor_id FOREIGN KEY ("surveyor_id") REFERENCES surveyors ("surveyor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "observed_species" (
  "observation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each observation */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey during which the species was observed */,
  "species_id" INTEGER /* ID of the observed species */,
  "density" REAL /* Density of the species */,
  "frequency" REAL /* Frequency of the species */,
  "abundance" REAL /* Abundance of the species */,
  "ivi" REAL /* Importance Value Index (IVI) of the species */,
  "habit_id" INTEGER /* ID of the habit type of the species */,
  "distance" TEXT /* Distance from a reference point */,
  "basal_area" REAL /* Basal area of the species */,
  "age_class" TEXT /* Age class of the observed species */,
  "health_status" TEXT /* Health status of the observed species */,
  "canopy_cover" REAL /* Percentage of canopy cover by the species */,
  "soil_moisture" REAL /* Soil moisture at the observation point */,
  "light_intensity" REAL /* Light intensity at the observation point */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("observation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observed_species_species_id FOREIGN KEY ("species_id") REFERENCES species ("species_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observed_species_habit_id FOREIGN KEY ("habit_id") REFERENCES habit ("habit_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_observed_species_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "surveyors" (
  "surveyor_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each surveyor */,
  "surveyor_name" TEXT /* Full name of the surveyor */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the surveyor */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the surveyor (e.g., researcher, technician) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the surveyor is affiliated with */,
  "experience_level" TEXT /* Experience level of the surveyor */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("surveyor_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., researcher, data analyst, admin) */,
  "institution" TEXT /* Institution the user is affiliated with */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Last login date of the user */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the data was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "resource_id" TEXT /* ID of the resource being accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address of the user */,
  "user_agent" TEXT /* User agent string of the user's browser or client */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "ecosystems" (
  "ecosystem_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each ecosystem type */,
  "ecosystem_name" TEXT /* Name of the ecosystem type */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the ecosystem type */,
  "average_temperature" REAL /* Average temperature of the ecosystem */,
  "average_humidity" REAL /* Average humidity of the ecosystem */,
  "annual_precipitation" REAL /* Annual precipitation of the ecosystem */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("ecosystem_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "environmental_conditions" (
  "condition_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each environmental condition record */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey during which the conditions were recorded */,
  "temperature" REAL /* Temperature during the survey */,
  "humidity" REAL /* Humidity during the survey */,
  "precipitation" REAL /* Precipitation during the survey */,
  "soil_type" TEXT /* Type of soil at the site */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Notes or comments about the environmental conditions */,
  "wind_speed" REAL /* Wind speed during the survey */,
  "wind_direction" TEXT /* Wind direction during the survey */,
  "cloud_cover" REAL /* Cloud cover during the survey */,
  "sunlight_exposure" REAL /* Sunlight exposure during the survey */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("condition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_environmental_conditions_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "data_files" (
  "file_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each data file */,
  "survey_id" INTEGER /* ID of the survey the file belongs to */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the data file */,
  "file_size" REAL /* Size of the data file in MB */,
  "upload_date" TEXT /* Date the file was uploaded */,
  "file_type" TEXT /* Type of the data file */,
  "file_description" TEXT /* Description of the data file */,
  "file_md5" TEXT /* MD5 hash of the file for integrity verification */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("file_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_data_files_survey_id FOREIGN KEY ("survey_id") REFERENCES surveys ("survey_id")
)
